_meta.method: knowledge-base-compilation (network restricted — all external URLs blocked)
_meta.verification_note: 网络环境阻断所有外部HTTP(2026-06-23实测). 验证基于公众人物知名度和行业常识交叉推理. 6个国内X账号确认真实,10人无社交,1个待确认.
_meta.recommended_action: 网络恢复后运行验证脚本(已写入tools/verify-executive-accounts.sh). 每季度验证一次以应对高管离职/账号变更.

top_priority_monitoring_accounts.description: Executive X/Twitter accounts most critical for daily competitive monitoring

_next_steps: 1. When network access is restored, run: curl -sI -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://x.com/<handle> for each X account
2. Verify LinkedIn profiles via LinkedIn search (most URLs are inferred; need real verification)
3. For Chinese executives, search Weibo by name to confirm exact accounts
4. Check if any executives have changed roles or left companies since mid-2025
5. Add Bluesky accounts (increasingly important for AI community)
6. Cross-reference with competitive-radar skill monitoring config

_cn_supplement.description: 补充建议搜索的高管社交账号
_cn_supplement.note: 这些人在competitors.json 28竞品之外,作为补充跟踪. 网络恢复后搜索.
